---
title: "Datacenter Knowledgebase (451 Research)"
page-layout: article
---

# Datacenter Knowledgebase (451 Research)

## Description

Global database of data center facilities, infrastructure, capacity, utilization, and market activity. Useful for research on cloud computing, digital infrastructure, and technology markets.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Data Platform
- **Access model:** Request Required, Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** Data Platform

## Access notes

Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

## Links

- [Request access](https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=u76M3Tkh-E20EU4-h6vrXGa2PpecL_VHoOa9Jy4XGNVUQTFTSEtMRk84SVJTSUVBT0RDSzZSWkQ0WSQlQCN0PWcu&route=shorturl)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
